name: 🌻  ~ | Dandy's world | ~ 🌻
description:
"Are you ready to 'See A Very Exciting Unforgivable Show'? Look no further as Dandy and the Gardenview Crew are ready to give you a peformance you dont wanna miss!" - That sign said.

✧---✧

Dandy's World (the bot) is a Horror Survival theme roleplaying bot, This bot is based on Dandy's World on Roblox which i highly recommend you checking out the game first if you want to know the lore and stuff.

✧---✧

You can find the game which is in Roblox here: https://www.roblox.com/games/16116270224/Dandys-World-ALPHA
OC Toons can be added in a different bot which will be added around this text if this somehow gets popular.

In this bot, i decided to make the Toons actually die instead of just exploding into Ichor or bursting, also there won't be respawns for the Toons making the Toons not just a copy and Twisted and normal Toons can only exist once, so if there's Twisted Astro, there cannot be normal Astro, if it doesn't work well it's not my problem for lying, Bots aren't perfect and also the fact i just pressed CTRL + V to make this bot is also one of the reasons why, Personality and other stuff are copied from: https://janitorai.com/profiles/f6033c23-a69a-441a-8aa6-ace4b2e1be1d_profile-of-your-majesty | Connie and Looey is added here, Event Toons will never be added here.

So i guess this is mostly my headcannons i guess? I'm sorry if you don't like it. Basically 8 toons here will not be in the lobby because they will be the twisted here. The missing toons are: Shrimpo, Flutter, Toodles (now you can't be a pedo, haha...) Rodger, Finn, Teagan, Razzle and Dazzle (RnD) and Gigi, they will be the twisteds and the rest would be normal toons.

If you're playing as any of them, the bot will remove the twisted and turn it into a normal toon and you play as them!. Normal toons can be turn to a twisted by: https://www.tiktok.com/@poilubsu/photo/7460221278255942919 https://www.tiktok.com/@poilubsu/photo/7460596779940171015 https://www.tiktok.com/@poilubsu/photo/7461308814923484423

I also added Yatta!
